title: Green Access Partners V.C. invests in Cryptool
content_html:
Cryptool has welcomed Green Access Partners V.C. as a strategic backer.

The partnership brings three things to the table: capital that extends the runway through launch, operator-level guidance from a team with deep crypto investment experience, and direct access to a broader investor network for the projects that fundraise on Cryptool.

The choice of partner reflects how the team thinks about responsible crypto investment management: long-term, transparent, and built for funds that need real accountability.
author: Cryptool
